testcase.name: test_login_with_valid_credentials

failure.message: IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.failure: tests\test_login_authentication.py:159: in test_login_with_valid_credentials line_num = get_exception_line() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests\test_login_authentication.py:23: in get_exception_line return traceback.extract_tb(traceback.sys.exc_info()[2])[-1].lineno ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E IndexError: list index out of range
